companies.name: Vision4Quality GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Vision4Quality GmbH. Vision4Quality GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Vision4Quality offers camera-based KI solutions in combination with worker guiding, AOI, and Robotic Guidance based on their own No-Code Software. Vision4Quality GmbH employs 12 people (+5.9% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Würzburg, Bayern, Germany.
[...]
Mit KI-basierten AOI- und Werkerführungssystemen Ausschuss verringern und Qualität erhöhen. Wir vereinen moderne Kameratechnik mit benutzerfreundlicher Software für jeden Use-Case.
[...]
Durch unsere No-Code-Philosophie machen wir selbst komplexe Kamera-Applikationen für ungeschulte Mitarbeiter zugänglich. Mithilfe von KI-Einbindung können in wenigen Klicks Programme erstellt werden, die flexibel sowohl für Werkerführung, als auch AOI und Robotic Guidance verwendet werden können. Dabei geben unsere verschiedenen Produkte jedem die notwendigen Werkzeuge in die Hand, sich ein System nach den eigenen Bedürfnissen zu erstellen.
[...]
Unsere Produkte bieten neben hoher Perfomance und intuitiver Bedienung außerdem die Möglichkeit, Daten langfristig zu speichern und bequem vom eigenen Rechner aus zu analysieren und Arbeitsabläufe zu optimieren. 

Kontaktieren Sie uns gerne hier oder über unsere Webseite für mehr Infos oder eine online Live-Demo
[...]
Gerne installieren wir auch ein Testgerät bei Ihnen vor Ort.
[...]
- Industr

companies.name: ROBOVIS
companies.shortDescription:
ROBOVIS. ROBOVIS is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. ROBOVIS AI-LABS is a company that specializes in innovative AI robotics and vision solutions. ROBOVIS employs 7 people (+50.0% YoY, +3 people), founded in 2015. Headquartered in Wildau, Brandenburg, Germany, with presence in India.
[...]
ROBOVIS is a leading AI-powered machine vision and robotics company committed to revolutionizing industries worldwide. We develop cutting-edge products and applications that drive innovation, enhance efficiency, and deliver exceptional value to our clients.
[...]
Our expert teams design and implement customized solutions, ensuring that every customer benefits from advanced technology tailored to their specific needs.
[...]
For our customers and partners, ROBOVIS offers:
[...]
1. 100% quality assurance in production processes
2. AI-powered process control through our patented PMS software platform
3. Seamless integration of RoboPicker vision sensors into industrial workflows
4. Full automation to optimize resources and enhance efficiency
5. Minimized downtime and maximized return on investment (ROI)
6. 24/7 support and service for uninterrupted operations
7. All-in-one solutions without the need for third-party systems
[...]
- Industry: Automation Machinery Manufacturing
- Type: Privately Held
- Headquarters: Wildau, Germany
- Founded Year: 2015
- Homepage: robovis.ai

companies.name: Mech
companies.shortDescription:
Mech-Mind Robotics. Mech-Mind Robotics is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Mech-Mind provides 3D cameras and software suites for robotic system integrators. Typical 3D vision applications include bin picking, depalletizing, machine tending, piece picking and item picking. We have delivered 3000+ applications for 1000+ clients worldwide. Mech-Mind Robotics employs 95 people (+6.9% YoY, +11 people), founded in 2016. Headquartered in Munich, Germany, operates in 17 countries (including China, United States, Japan, South Korea, and Mexico). Has $268.1M in total funding, with 7 prior funding rounds.
[...]
Mech-Mind is a leading company focusing on industrial 3D cameras and AI-powered software for intelligent robotics. By combining 3D vision with AI technology, the Mech-Mind team around the globe continues to set new standards in robotics, taking automation to the next level. We’re building intelligent robots with the capabilities to see, think, and act with unprecedented agility and reliability. Our innovations empower partners and system integrators to manage the most challenging automation tasks, including bin picking, depalletizing, piece picking, assembly, and quality inspection.
[...]
- Industry: Automation Machinery Manufacturing
- Type: Privately Held
- Headquarters: Munich, Germany
- Founded Year: 2016
- Homepage: mech-mind.com
- Status: active
- Ownership: Priv

Teqram. Teqram is a Industrial Automation company. Teqram is a company that delivers robot systems and handling applications for a wide range of industries. Teqram employs 25 people (-3.3% YoY, -1 person), founded in 2016. Headquartered in Netherlands, with presence in Germany.
[...]
Teqram is a market leader in vision-guided robotics. Our technology uses AI to make robots smarter, more flexible, and more versatile than ever before.
[...]
We develop autonomous robotic solutions that enable the automated execution of various sheet metal fabrication processes such as grinding, deburring, and blasting – all without programming or teaching. 

Our interdisciplinary team brings together expertise in software development, machine vision, robotics, and mechatronics. Together, we create solutions that revolutionize industrial workflows – fast, safe, and efficient.

companies.name: Vathos
companies.shortDescription:
Vathos. Vathos is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Vathos is a company that provides robot vision software for vision-based object detection and in-line thermography. They offer a range of software solutions for process monitoring in injection molding detection models and design concepts. The company also provides video tutorials and support documentation for integrations into Python, kuka krl, and ur script. Vathos employs 6 people, founded in 2015. Headquartered in Düsseldorf, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, with presence in Austria. with 1 prior funding round.
[...]
Vathos is a Dusseldorf-based start-up com­pany speciali­zing in com­pu­ter vision and ma­chine learning for applica­tions in robotics/factory auto­mation. Our mot­to is flexi­bility, which we be­lieve is key in un­loc­king the vast poten­tial of auto­mation for all enter­prises. We are bridging the gap between tradi­tional robotics and the state of the art in com­puter science to sup­port our cus­tomers in transi­tioning to the indus­trial digital age.
[...]

Als Experten für Bildverarbeitung und Automatisierung entwickeln wir Lösungen zur Inspektion, Analyse und Qualitätskontrolle sowie zur Automatisierung und Regelung von Produktionsprozessen – inline und offline.
